name: draw-on
title: DrawOn
description: An SVG path that strokes itself in — the substrate for logos, icons, and signature flourishes. Powered by @remotion/paths's evolvePath, driven by SPRING_SMOOTH. No overshoot.
pickWhen: any SVG that should stroke itself on — logo lockup, signature, hand-drawn icon. For the full branded sting use `logo-sting`.
